                                                                                                                            b1768   China’s Rise: Development-Oriented Finance and Sustainable Development

xxiv    China’s Rise: Development-Oriented Finance and Sustainable Development

In recent years, under the leadership of the State Council and
                                                                                                                    relevant departments, CDB has endeavored to forge ahead on the
                                                                                                                    basis of summing up experience and has ushered in a new stage of
                                                                                                                    development. According to the CDB Reform Program of the State
                                                                                                                    Council, CDB will be transformed from a policy financial institution
by 133.43.245.17 on 12/07/25. Re-use and distribution is strictly not permitted, except for Open Access articles.

into a commercial bank. After the reform, it will support significant
                                                                                                                    long- and mid-term development strategies of the economy by pro-
                                                                                                                    viding financial services such as long- and mid-term credit loans and
                                                                                                                    investments. In other words, the foremost focus in long- and mid-
                                                                                                                    term businesses which CDB should persist in after its transformation
                                                                                                                    will distinguish it from other commercial banks. In the meantime,
